ddls:
CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the age group */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender_types" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender type */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the gender type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Countries included in the region */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey result */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender type */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic region */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total number of respondents in the group */,
  "feedback_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who provided feedback */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by respondents in the group */,
  "total_feedback_count" INTEGER /* Total number of feedback received from the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_results_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES gender_types ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_results_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_results_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the survey question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the question (e.g., job satisfaction, work environment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question option */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey question */,
  "option_text" TEXT /* Text of the option */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* True if the option is the correct answer, False otherwise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_options_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the respondent */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the respondent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender type */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic region */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the respondent */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the respondent */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Unique employee ID of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES gender_types ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the respondent */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was last updated */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback (e.g., job satisfaction, work environment) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* True if the feedback has been resolved, False otherwise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_feedback_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR, Management, Analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Specific data accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
